question: Why did RevPAR for Ardmore Grand Sunbelt properties drop 11% week-over-week while Heritage city properties grew 3%?
metric_label: RevPAR attribution by brand, region, and week

upstream_models.description: Conformed reservation spine joining Oracle Opera PMS with OTA and direct booking channel flags. Includes book_date, arrival_date, channel_code, and rate_plan_id.
Daily OTA-vs-direct rate comparison by property and channel. Includes ota_rate_usd, direct_rate_usd, and parity_gap_pct computed from Sabre and Expedia feeds via Fivetran.
Daily RevPAR, ADR, and occupancy rolled up per property from the Opera PMS. Joins to the property dimension for brand and region classification.
Property master with brand (Ardmore Grand, Heritage), market segment, region (Sunbelt, Northeast, Mountain, Pacific), and room count. Primary dimension for brand-region roll-ups.
